afterFileEdit.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$filePath = '{{file_path}}'; if ($filePath -match '\.dart$' -and $filePath -notmatch '\.(g|freezed)\.dart$') { dart format $filePath 2>$null; if ($filePath -match 'models[\\/].*\.dart$' -or $filePath -match 'domain[\\/].*\.dart$') { Write-Host 'Model alterado - rode build_runner quando terminar' } }"

beforeShellExecution.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$input_data = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); if ($input_data -match 'rm\s+-rf|Remove-Item.*-Recurse.*lib|drop\s+table|truncate\s+table|delete\s+from(?!.*where)') { echo '{\"permission\": \"deny\", \"reason\": \"Comando destrutivo bloqueado. Revise antes de executar.\"}' } else { echo '{\"permission\": \"allow\"}' }"
